title: Xtra Comforting Korean Vine Tomatoes Gratin
description: A rich and light Korean dish featuring vine tomatoes, beurre-monte, and low-glycemic-friendly ingredients, inspired by the Gyeongsang cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together gochujang, soy sauce, and melted beurre-monte.
Add the halved vine tomatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the sauce.
In a separate bowl, mix together cooked brown rice, chopped green onions, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of the rice mixture.
Arrange the tomato halves on top of the rice layer.
Pour the remaining sauce over the tomatoes.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the tomatoes are tender.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
